name: Reliance on Obfuscation or Encryption of Security-Relevant Inputs without Integrity Checking
description: The product uses obfuscation or encryption for security-relevant inputs (such as client-controllable tokens or parameters) but fails to implement integrity verification. This allows attackers to modify encrypted or obfuscated values without detection, potentially elevating privileges or altering system behavior.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides encrypted or obfuscated data that flows through a TRANSFORM node (decryption/deobfuscation) to AUTH or CONTROL nodes making security decisions, without a CONTROL node verifying data integrity via MAC, HMAC, or digital signature before processing.
